title: Mayor Walsh Issues Snow Safety Alert for Upcoming Winter Storm
summary: Mayor Ben Walsh issued a snow safety alert for a winter storm affecting Syracuse from Wednesday evening through Friday morning, December 4-6, 2024. The alert directs residents to follow parking restrictions, clear sidewalks and fire hydrants, and prepare for hazardous road conditions. The City will prioritize plowing primary and service roads while encouraging residents to monitor real-time conditions via the Snow Plow Map and social media.

political_signal.description: Mayor proactively communicates winter storm response and resident compliance expectations; emphasizes interagency coordination and data-driven parking enforcement strategy on priority streets.
